hooks.command: echo '{"additionalContext":"Forged by Anvil. Read CLAUDE.md. Use /forge-status, /forge-phase."}'

cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && PHASE=$(grep -A1 "🔄 In Progress" CLAUDE.md 2>/dev/null | head -1 | grep -oE "[0-9]+" | head -1 || echo "") && PREFIX=${PHASE:+[P$PHASE] } && git add -A && git diff --cached --quiet || git commit -m "${PREFIX}wip: auto-commit" --no-verify
